name: Marlin Wong
text:
**Errors found (4) — Pretty confident:**

Error 1: "state-of-the-art performance" -> Unjustified
Error 2: Implausible "23.4% average accuracy improvement" -> Doesn't show baseline acc, new accuracy, and dataset results
Error 3: "reduces consistency by 60%" -> What is inconsistency
Error 4: "Novel consistency score" -> No formula or comparison to existing metrics
